items.content: Use Node.js for proxy — OpenAI SDK is Node-native, Lambda has first-class Node support, matches team skills
DynamoDB over Postgres — Serverless, scales with Lambda, sub-100ms reads, no connection pooling needed, pay-per-request
React for dashboard — Fastest path to 5 screens, massive ecosystem, deploys to S3+CloudFront trivially
CloudFormation over Terraform — Native AWS, customers click one link in AWS console, no external tooling required
Monorepo structure (proxy/ dashboard/ infra/ demo/) — Single repo for all components, simpler CI, one git history
OpenAI-compatible endpoint only (v1) — 80%+ of enterprise LLM spend is OpenAI. Anthropic/others come after first customer.

Mission completed: Proxy MVP: Node.js Lambda. One OpenAI-compatible endpoint (`/v1/chat/completions`). DynamoDB writes (calls table). Kill switch check, budget check, passthrough to OpenAI. `x-agent-id` header parsing. Returns identical response format.
Mission completed: Cache + Router: DynamoDB reads for semantic cache (cache table). Rules-based model router. Budget tracking (budgets table). Real savings visible in call logs.

Mission completed: Dashboard: React app, 5 screens. Overview (total spend, agent breakdown). Agent drill-down (waste flags, the number that hurts). Controls panel (working kill switches). Live simulator (real cache hits). CFO view (spend vs ROI).

Mission completed: OperaERP Demo: Seed DynamoDB with 3 weeks of realistic data. 6 agents. Procurement Agent villain (42% spend, $1,840/month on one pattern). Day 14 anomaly (Supplier Validator loop, $840 in 3 hours). Live simulator firing real queries through real proxy.
Mission completed: Dashboard: React app, 7 screens. Overview, Agents, Workflows, Controls, Versions, Simulator, CFO View.

Mission completed: Advanced Features: Workflow grouping (`x-workflow-id`). Per-agent rate limiting (RPM ceiling). Prompt versioning (version, track quality, one-click rollback). Streaming pass-through (log async, first token no delay).

Mission completed: CloudFormation: SAM template: Lambda + 6 DynamoDB tables + HTTP API Gateway + S3 + CloudFront (OAC). 3 parameters (OpenAI key, RPM, cache TTL). Deploy script with 4-step pipeline. `npm run deploy` one-command.
Mission completed: Ship: 38/38 integration tests passing. INSTALL.md with 3-step install story. Full env var docs. All endpoints documented. Demo server runs standalone.
